summary: Comprehensive testing of notification system improvements completed successfully. All three key features working: 1) NotificationDropdown auto-marks notifications as read when opened (no 'Mark all as read' button), 2) Achievement notifications created with proper type 'achievement_unlocked' and data structure, 3) Achievement notifications show Award icon and navigate to profile page correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/predictions creates prediction and triggers achievement check
Achievement completion creates notification with type 'achievement_unlocked'
GET /api/notifications returns achievement notifications with correct format
POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read
NotificationDropdown opens and shows achievement notifications
Notification panel displays achievement_unlocked notifications with Award icon
Achievement notification clicking navigates to /profile correctly
Profile page shows achievements section with completed achievements
Backend health check at /api/health returns healthy
Homepage renders correctly with no regressions
Admin user has 1 completed achievement (First Step)
Auto-mark-read functionality working (no 'Mark all as read' button visible)
